## Drops makes it simple

### Find all unclaimed Airdrops

#### The best airdrop checker and tracker.

Tracking 348 of the most recent crypto airdrops, with more constantly being added to the checker.

#### Claim Airdrops safely.

See which Airdrops you are eligible for and claim them via verified, official links.

#### No need to connect a wallet.

Just enter any crypto wallet address from the supported networks. Wallet connection is never required.

![Product screenshot](/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fairdrop-page-zk.61897d53.jpg&w=1920&q=75)

### Never miss Airdrops again

#### 8+ networks.

Watch and track all your wallet addresses across [multiple supported networks.](/airdrops)

#### Stay up to date on Telegram.

Receive Telegram alerts for new Airdrops when one of your addresses becomes eligible.

#### Privacy is our priority.

We never share user data with third parties. All eligibility checks are proxied, and your wallet addresses are not linked to each other.

![Dashboard screenshot](/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fdashboard-page.dee83e8d.jpg&w=1920&q=75)

## Frequently asked questions

### All About Airdrops and Drops

### Airdrops

## 

What are Airdrops?

Airdrops are a marketing strategy in the cryptocurrency world where blockchain projects distribute free tokens to the community to promote awareness and adoption. These tokens are often given to users who complete specific tasks, such as onchain activities or joining a community group.

Airdrops can be profitable for protocol users as they receive free tokens that may increase in value over time, providing a direct financial benefit.

If you have active wallets or addresses on any of the supported blockchains/networks, you might be eligible for Airdrops!

---

## 

How to qualify for Airdops

Qualifying for airdrops through onchain activities involves engaging directly with a blockchain's ecosystem by performing specific tasks that demonstrate active participation and support. These activities can include trading, staking, or holding a particular cryptocurrency, interacting with decentralized applications (dApps), providing liquidity to decentralized exchanges (DEXs), or participating in governance votes.

By consistently engaging in these onchain activities, users not only contribute to the network's growth and stability but also position themselves as active members of the community, often making them eligible for airdrops. These onchain actions are verifiable through the blockchain, ensuring that the rewards are distributed to genuine and engaged users.

Drops makes it easy to check your eligibility for airdrops by monitoring your wallet addresses across multiple networks. Saving your addresses, you can receive real-time notifications on Telegram when you qualify for airdrops, ensuring that you can claim your airdrop before it expires, so you never miss out on free tokens.

You should also use Drops' free [Points checker dashboard](/free-points-checker) and [HyperEVM + Hyperliquid checker dashboard](/free-hyperevm-checker) to discover new projects and potential upcoming airdrops, and see the full list on [upcoming airdrops page](/airdrops/upcoming).

### General

## 

How can I find unclaimed Airdrops?

Drops is the most advanced airdrop checker. It finds unclaimed crypto airdrops for you by monitoring all your wallet addresses across multiple networks like Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Solana, Cosmos, Sui, Aptos, and Bitcoin. Just paste your crypto wallet address to the checker. No need to connect a wallet.

---

## 

How do I avoid missing Airdrops?

Just enter or paste any crypto wallet addresses, and Drops will instantly check your eligibility for all recent and verified airdrops. It will also run automatic background checks for new airdrops. If you're eligible, you'll get a notification on Telegram.

---

## 

What is Drops?

Drops is a regularly updated and easy to use airdrop checker that automatically finds unclaimed crypto airdrops for your wallets. The checker is kept up to date at all times, ensuring the latest airdrops across supported networks are included. You do not need to connect a wallet. You can check and track all your addresses across networks such as Ethereum, Solana, Cosmos, Bitcoin, Aptos, and SUI.

You can enable Telegram alerts to be notified when you become eligible for new airdrops, ensuring you never miss an opportunity. Drops works smoothly and quickly on both mobile and desktop, and includes a bulk checker to make airdrop discovery simple and efficient.

---

## 

What blockchains are supported on Drops?

Currently Drops can check unclaimed airdrops on [Ethereum & L2](/airdrops/ethereum-airdrop-checker), [Solana](/airdrops/solana-airdrop-checker), [Cosmos](/airdrops/cosmos-airdrop-checker), [Sui](/airdrops/sui-airdrop-checker), [Aptos](/airdrops/aptos-airdrop-checker), [Starknet](/airdrops/starknet-airdrop-checker), [Bitcoin](/airdrops/bitcoin-airdrop-checker), [TON](/airdrops/ton-airdrop-checker).

See the full list on [all supported airdrops page](/airdrops).

---

## 

How do I sign in?

With a Telegram account. Click "Log in" and follow the instructions.

---

## 

What is referral program?

Every user gets a unique referral link. Share it with your friends and earn 20 of their subscription fee. See the [referrals page](/earn) for more details.

---

## 

What are the Official Social Media Channels?

You can find us on [Telegram](https://t.me/DropsBotPortal), [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/intent/follow?screen_name=DropsBot) and [Farcaster](https://farcaster.xyz/dropsdotbot.eth)

---

## 

Any other free tools?

Yes! Drops offers some powerful free tools:

-   [Points checker dashboard](/free-points-checker). Check your wallet addresses for points across multiple protocols.
-   [HyperEVM checker dashboard](/free-hyperevm-checker). Track your stats, progress, and points on HyperEVM, HyperCore, and Hyperliquid in anticipation of the next $HYPE airdrop.

Both tools are free to use, no wallet connection needed.

---

## 

Is there Airdrops API for developers?

Yes, Drops has a [REST API for Airdrops](/airdrops-api). It provides a simple way to get all the airdrops for any wallet address across multiple networks. You can use it to build your own tools or integrate with existing applications.

### Privacy & Security

## 

Why is Telegram the only login option?

Telegram provides a secure and privacy-focused way to sign in. It allows you to authenticate without sharing your email or phone number with Drops, and it enables optional alerts from the bot when your wallet becomes eligible for new airdrops. Drops can't access your phone number, Telegram account data, and no information from your Telegram profile is shared with third parties.

---

## 

Is there a risk for my addresses to be labeled as sybil?

Unlikely. All eligibility check requests are routed (proxied) through our servers and are not linked to your account in any way. However, Drops is not intended for sybil attacks and strive to maintain strong relationships and communication with the protocols we support to provide a best possible service, while ensuring user privacy is never compromised!

---

## 

Is my data safe on Drops?

Yes, your data is kept safe. We do not share your data with any outside project or individual under any circumstances. Drops is founded in the EU and operates in full compliance with GDPR requirements. Your privacy is a fundamental principle of the service. For more information, you can review our [Privacy policy](/privacy).

---

## 

If protocols ask, do you provide them with user data to identify sybils?

No. Drops does not provide user data to any protocol or third party for sybil identification or for any other purpose. Protecting user privacy is a core principle of the service. For additional details, please review our [Privacy policy](/privacy).

### Billing & Payments

## 

Is Drops free to use?

Yes. You can check any wallet address for airdrops at no cost. If a wallet has eligible airdrops, you can choose to reveal them with a one time payment starting from 5 dollars per wallet, depending on the airdrop value. You can also upgrade to Premium, which allows you to track all your addresses in one place and receive Telegram alerts whenever new airdrops become available.

Drops also offers some powerful free tools:

-   [Points checker dashboard](/free-points-checker). Check your wallet addresses for points across multiple protocols.
-   [HyperEVM checker dashboard](/free-hyperevm-checker). Track your stats, progress, and points on HyperEVM, HyperCore, and Hyperliquid in anticipation of the next $HYPE airdrop.

Both tools are free to use, no wallet connection needed.

---

## 

What payment methods are available?

You can pay in ETH, SOL or stablecoins on multiple chains. You can opt in to automatic billing, or email invoices.

---

## 

Is it safe to pay with crypto?

Yes, it is safe. You are not required to connect a wallet to complete a payment. You can simply send the payment to the billing address shown on the checkout page. Crypto payments are processed by [Boomfi](https://www.boomfi.xyz/), a regulated provider based in the United Kingdom. You can review their legal information on [their website.](https://www.boomfi.xyz/legal-pages)

---

## 

Can I cancel my premium plan?

Yes, you can cancel anytime. If you cancel and have added more than 0 addresses, you will only see the first 0 addresses and won't receive notifications for any airdrops to the other addresses. This will remain until you subscribe again.

---

## 

I was late on my payment, and the Premium plan expired. What to do now?

You can simply subscribe to premium again. All the addresses you have added and Airdrops you are eligible become visible again after.

### Issues

## 

Why is see "Failed to check eligibility" message?

Sometimes there are changes on how the protocols do the eligibility checks. We are usually quick to fix it in the background. No action is needed from you.

---

## 

Other issues

If you have any other issues or questions, join our [Telegram community](https://t.me/DropsBotPortal) and ask there. We are happy to help!
